full_text:
Ji Kang (Shuye) 嵇康 (叔夜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Kang (嵇康), styledShuye (叔夜), was born in Qiao Guo [谯国] in An Hui [安徽]. One of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove. He was exeuted by Sima Zhao. Ji Kang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ji Kang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
